title: antennaria dioica var. parvifolia
intro: Antennaria dioica var. parvifolia, also known as Partridge Feather, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Antennaria dioica, native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating a range of health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Antennaria dioica var. parvifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, with traditional herbal preparations often involving the use of the plant's leaves and flowers.
